key.name: move-up
key.summary: Cycle the focused window through top layouts

key.name: move-left
key.summary: Cycle the focused window through left layouts

key.name: move-down
key.summary: Cycle the focused window through bottom layouts

key.name: move-right
key.summary: Cycle the focused window through right layouts

key.name: move-max-almost
key.summary: Cycle the focused window through almost-maximized and centered layouts
